issueDetail.descReported: Initial report logged by user. Documentation and visual proof successfully uploaded and verified.
issueDetail.descVerified: Department of Infrastructure has acknowledged and assigned a field specialist.
issueDetail.descAssigned: Specialists are currently at the location. Real-time diagnostic data is being synchronized.

editProfile.defaultBio: CivicCore member since {{year}}. Actively shaping the urban landscape through high-impact initiatives.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.p1: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you create or modify your account, report issues, or communicate with us. This includes your name, email, phone number, and location data when reporting civic issues.
privacyPolicy.p2: We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our services, specifically to route civic issues to the appropriate authorities, track issue resolution, and keep you informed about updates in your community.
privacyPolicy.p3: Your reported issues, including location and photos, are shared with local civic bodies to facilitate resolution. We do not sell your personal data to third parties.
privacyPolicy.p4: We take reasonable measures to help protect information about you from loss, theft, misuse and unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration, and destruction.

termsOfService.title: Terms of Service
termsOfService.p1: By accessing or using the CivicResolv platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our services.
termsOfService.p2: You agree to use the platform only for lawful purposes. You must not submit false reports, upload inappropriate content, or engage in any behavior that harasses or disrupts the community.
termsOfService.p3: By submitting photos and reports, you grant CivicResolv a non-exclusive, royalty-free license to use, display, and distribute this content for the purpose of resolving civic issues.
termsOfService.p4: CivicResolv serves as a bridge between citizens and authorities. We do not guarantee the resolution of any reported issue and are not liable for any damages arising from the use of our platform.
